declaration_signature: theorem momentum_two_sub_mass_eq_energy : (2 : Nat) • SI.momentumDim - SI.massDim = SI.energyDim
def lagrangian1D (m : Mass) (V : Length -> Energy) (x : Length) (v : Speed) : Energy
def canonicalMomentum1D (m : Mass) (v : Speed) : Momentum
def hamiltonianXV (m : Mass) (V : Length -> Energy) (x : Length) (v : Speed) : Energy
def hamiltonianXP (m : Mass) (V : Length -> Energy) (x : Length) (p : Momentum) : Energy
def eulerLagrangeResidual1D (m : Mass) (dVdx : Length -> Force) (x : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (a : Kinematics.ScalarAccelerationField) : Real -> Force
def SatisfiesEulerLagrange1D (m : Mass) (dVdx : Length -> Force) (x : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (a : Kinematics.ScalarAccelerationField) : Prop
def SatisfiesNewtonForm1D (m : Mass) (dVdx : Length -> Force) (x : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (a : Kinematics.ScalarAccelerationField) : Prop

def CanonicalEquations1D (dHdp : Length -> Momentum -> Speed) (dHdx : Length -> Momentum -> Force) (x : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (p : Real -> Momentum) (xDot : Kinematics.ScalarVelocityField) (pDot : Real -> Force) : Prop
def IsCyclicCoordinate (dLdq : Real -> Force) : Prop
def MomentumConserved (pDot : Real -> Force) : Prop
theorem lagrangian1D_eq (m : Mass) (V : Length -> Energy) (x : Length) (v : Speed) : lagrangian1D m V x v = WorkEnergy.kineticEnergy1D m v - V x
theorem canonicalMomentum1D_eq (m : Mass) (v : Speed) : canonicalMomentum1D m v = m * v
theorem hamiltonianXV_eq (m : Mass) (V : Length -> Energy) (x : Length) (v : Speed) : hamiltonianXV m V x v = WorkEnergy.kineticEnergy1D m v + V x
theorem hamiltonianXP_eq (m : Mass) (V : Length -> Energy) (x : Length) (p : Momentum) : hamiltonianXP m V x p = Quantity.cast ((p ** 2) / ((2 : Real) • m)) momentum_two_sub_mass_eq_energy + V x
theorem hamiltonianXP_of_canonicalMomentum (m : Mass) (V : Length -> Energy) (x : Length) (v : Speed) (h : m.val ≠ 0) : hamiltonianXP m V x (canonicalMomentum1D m v) = hamiltonianXV m V x v
proof_style_example: have hm2 : (2 : Real) * m.val ≠ 0 := mul_ne_zero two_ne_zero h ; simp [hamiltonianXP, hamiltonianXV, canonicalMomentum1D, ; field_simp [h, hm2]

declaration_signature: theorem eulerLagrange_iff_newton (m : Mass) (dVdx : Length -> Force) (x : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (a : Kinematics.ScalarAccelerationField) : SatisfiesEulerLagrange1D m dVdx x a ↔ SatisfiesNewtonForm1D m dVdx x a
proof_style_example: constructor ; have hval : (m * a t).val + (dVdx (x t)).val = 0 := by ; simpa [SatisfiesEulerLagrange1D, eulerLagrangeResidual1D] using congrArg Quantity.val (hEL t)

declaration_signature: theorem canonicalEquations1D_eq (dHdp : Length -> Momentum -> Speed) (dHdx : Length -> Momentum -> Force) (x : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (p : Real -> Momentum) (xDot : Kinematics.ScalarVelocityField) (pDot : Real -> Force) : CanonicalEquations1D dHdp dHdx x p xDot pDot = (forall t, xDot t = dHdp (x t) (p t) ∧ pDot t = -dHdx (x t) (p t))
theorem cyclic_coordinate_implies_momentum_conserved (dLdq : Real -> Force) (pDot : Real -> Force) (hEq : forall t, pDot t = dLdq t) (hCyclic : IsCyclicCoordinate dLdq) : MomentumConserved pDot
proof_style_example: intro t ; rw [hEq t, hCyclic t]

declaration_signature: def actionFunctional1D (L : Length -> Speed -> Energy) (q : Real -> Length) (qDot : Real -> Speed) (t0 t1 : Real) : Real
def stationaryAction1D (S : (Real -> Length) -> Real) (q : Real -> Length) : Prop
def legendreRegular1D (pOfV : Speed -> Momentum) : Prop
abbrev PhaseFunction1D
def poissonBracket1D (dFdx dFdp dGdx dGdp : PhaseFunction1D) : PhaseFunction1D
theorem poissonBracket1D_antisymm (dFdx dFdp dGdx dGdp : PhaseFunction1D) : poissonBracket1D dFdx dFdp dGdx dGdp = fun x p => -poissonBracket1D dGdx dGdp dFdx dFdp x p
def lagrangeMultiplierEquation1D (EL : Real -> Force) (lam : Real -> Dimensionless) (dCdq : Real -> Force) : Prop
theorem lagrangeMultiplierEquation1D_eq (EL : Real -> Force) (lam : Real -> Dimensionless) (dCdq : Real -> Force) : lagrangeMultiplierEquation1D EL lam dCdq = (forall t, EL t = (lam t).val • dCdq t)
def IsCentralForcePair (r : VecLength 3) (F : VecForce 3) : Prop
def hookeCentralForce (k : SpringConstant) (r : VecLength 3) : VecForce 3
theorem cross_self_zero {d : Dim} (u : VecQuantity d 3) : u ×ᵥ u = 0
proof_style_example: fin_cases i <;> simp [VecQuantity.cross, Fin.cases] ; all_goals ring

declaration_signature: theorem angularMomentum_two_sub_mass_two_length_eq_energy : (2 : Nat) • SI.angularMomentumDim - (SI.massDim + (2 : Nat) • SI.lengthDim) = SI.energyDim
abbrev GravParameter
theorem energy_plus_length_sub_length_eq_energy : (SI.energyDim + SI.lengthDim) - SI.lengthDim = SI.energyDim
def centrifugalPotentialTerm (L : AngularMomentum) (m : Mass) (r : Length) : Energy
def effectivePotential (U : Length -> Energy) (L : AngularMomentum) (m : Mass) (r : Length) : Energy
def inverseSquarePotential (μ : GravParameter) (r : Length) : Energy
def RadialEquation (m : Mass) (r : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (aR : Kinematics.ScalarAccelerationField) (dUeffdr : Length -> Force) : Prop
theorem hookeCentralForce_eq (k : SpringConstant) (r : VecLength 3) : hookeCentralForce k r = VecQuantity.cast ((-k) * r) SI.spring_plus_length_eq_force
theorem hookeCentralForce_torque_zero (k : SpringConstant) (r : VecLength 3) : Rotation.torque r (hookeCentralForce k r) = 0
proof_style_example: fin_cases i <;> simp [VecQuantity.cross, VecQuantity.cast_val, VecQuantity.val_qmul_vec, Fin.cases] ; all_goals ring

declaration_signature: theorem hookeCentralForce_isCentral (k : SpringConstant) (r : VecLength 3) : IsCentralForcePair r (hookeCentralForce k r)

theorem centrifugalPotentialTerm_eq (L : AngularMomentum) (m : Mass) (r : Length) : centrifugalPotentialTerm L m r = Quantity.cast ((L ** 2) / (((2 : Real) • m) * (r ** 2))) angularMomentum_two_sub_mass_two_length_eq_energy
theorem effectivePotential_eq (U : Length -> Energy) (L : AngularMomentum) (m : Mass) (r : Length) : effectivePotential U L m r = U r + centrifugalPotentialTerm L m r
theorem inverseSquarePotential_eq (μ : GravParameter) (r : Length) : inverseSquarePotential μ r = Quantity.cast (-(μ / r)) energy_plus_length_sub_length_eq_energy

theorem radialEquation_eq (m : Mass) (r : Kinematics.ScalarTrajectory) (aR : Kinematics.ScalarAccelerationField) (dUeffdr : Length -> Force) : RadialEquation m r aR dUeffdr = (forall t, m * aR t = -dUeffdr (r t))
def BinetEquation (u : Real -> Real) (θ : Real) (μ : Real) (hForce : Real -> Real) : Prop
def KeplerSecondLaw (arealVelocity : Real -> Real) : Prop
def BoundOrbitCriterion (Ueff : Real -> Real) (E : Real) : Prop
def classifyInverseSquareOrbit (E : Energy) : OrbitClass
theorem keplerSecondLaw_eq (arealVelocity : Real -> Real) : KeplerSecondLaw arealVelocity = (∃ c : Real, forall t, arealVelocity t = c)

theorem classifyInverseSquareOrbit_trichotomy (E : Energy) : classifyInverseSquareOrbit E = OrbitClass.ellipse ∨ classifyInverseSquareOrbit E = OrbitClass.parabola ∨ classifyInverseSquareOrbit E = OrbitClass.hyperbola
lemma m_ne_zero (P : Params) : P.m.val ≠ 0
lemma k_ne_zero (P : Params) : P.k.val ≠ 0
def omega0 (P : Params) : AngularVelocity
lemma omega0_pos (P : Params) : 0 < P.omega0.val
proof_style_example: have hdiv : 0 < P.k.val / P.m.val := div_pos P.k_pos P.m_pos ; simpa [omega0, hertz, Quantity.standardUnit] using Real.sqrt_pos.mpr hdiv

declaration_signature: lemma omega0_sq_val (P : Params) : P.omega0.val ^ 2 = P.k.val / P.m.val
proof_style_example: have hnonneg : 0 <= P.k.val / P.m.val := div_nonneg (le_of_lt P.k_pos) (le_of_lt P.m_pos) ; simpa [omega0, hertz, Quantity.standardUnit] using Real.sq_sqrt hnonneg

declaration_signature: def equationResidual (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Time -> Force
def EquationOfMotion (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Prop
def kineticEnergy (P : Params) (v : Time -> Speed) : Time -> Energy
def potentialEnergy (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) : Time -> Energy
def energy (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) : Time -> Energy
def energyDissipationRate (P : Params) (v : Time -> Speed) : Time -> Power
def discriminant (P : Params) : Quantity dampingDiscriminantDim
def IsUnderdamped (P : Params) : Prop
def IsCriticallyDamped (P : Params) : Prop
def IsOverdamped (P : Params) : Prop

theorem equationResidual_eq (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : equationResidual P x v a = (fun t => P.m * a t + Quantity.cast (P.gamma * v t) SI.damping_speed_eq_force + Quantity.cast (P.k * x t) SI.spring_plus_length_eq_force)
theorem energy_eq (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) : energy P x v = fun t => kineticEnergy P v t + potentialEnergy P x t
theorem discriminant_eq (P : Params) : discriminant P = (P.gamma ** 2) - Quantity.cast ((4 : Real) • (P.m * P.k)) SI.mass_plus_spring_eq_damping_discriminant
theorem regimes_trichotomy (P : Params) : IsUnderdamped P ∨ IsCriticallyDamped P ∨ IsOverdamped P
proof_style_example: · exact Or.inl hlt ; · exact Or.inr (Or.inl heq) ; · exact Or.inr (Or.inr hgt)

declaration_signature: theorem underdamped_not_overdamped (P : Params) : IsUnderdamped P -> ¬ IsOverdamped P
proof_style_example: intro hUnder hOver ; exact lt_asymm hOver hUnder

declaration_signature: theorem undamped_is_underdamped (P : Params) (hgamma : P.gamma = 0) : IsUnderdamped P
proof_style_example: have hmk_pos : 0 < (P.m * P.k).val := by ; simpa using mul_pos P.m_pos P.k_pos ; have hval : ((P.gamma ** 2)

declaration_signature: theorem damping_sub_mass_eq_frequency : SI.dampingDim - SI.massDim = SI.frequencyDim
theorem mass_sub_damping_eq_time : SI.massDim - SI.dampingDim = SI.timeDim
theorem zero_add_zero_eq_zero : ((0 : Dim) + (0 : Dim)) = (0 : Dim)
def dampingRatio (P : Params) : Dimensionless
def qualityFactor (P : Params) : Dimensionless
def dampingRate (P : Params) : Frequency
def relaxationTime (P : Params) : Time
theorem qualityFactor_mul_dampingRatio (P : Params) (hgamma : P.gamma.val ≠ 0) : Quantity.cast (qualityFactor P * dampingRatio P) zero_add_zero_eq_zero = (((1 / 2 : Real)) : Dimensionless)
proof_style_example: have hmk_pos : 0 < P.m.val * P.k.val := mul_pos P.m_pos P.k_pos ; have hsqrt : Real.sqrt (P.m.val * P.k.val) ≠ 0 := by ; exact ne_of_gt (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr hmk_pos)

declaration_signature: theorem relaxationTime_mul_dampingRate (P : Params) (hgamma : P.gamma.val ≠ 0) : Quantity.cast (relaxationTime P * dampingRate P) SI.time_plus_angular_velocity_eq_dimensionless = (((1 / 2 : Real)) : Dimensionless)
proof_style_example: simp [relaxationTime, dampingRate, Quantity.cast_val, Quantity.val_ofReal] ; field_simp [hgamma, P.m_ne_zero]

declaration_signature: def undampedResidual (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Time -> Force
def UndampedEquationOfMotion (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Prop
theorem equationResidual_gamma_zero (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) (hgamma : P.gamma = 0) : equationResidual P x v a = undampedResidual P x a

theorem equationOfMotion_gamma_zero_iff (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) (hgamma : P.gamma = 0) : EquationOfMotion P x v a ↔ UndampedEquationOfMotion P x a
proof_style_example: constructor ; have ht : equationResidual P x v a t = 0 := h t ; simpa [equationResidual_gamma_zero (P := P) (x := x) (v := v) (a := a) hgamma] using ht

declaration_signature: def EnergyDissipationLaw (P : Params) (_x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (dEdt : Time -> Power) : Prop
def IsUnderdampedClosedForm (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Prop
def IsCriticalClosedForm (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Prop
def IsOverdampedClosedForm (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Prop
theorem energyDissipationLaw_eq (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (dEdt : Time -> Power) : EnergyDissipationLaw P x v dEdt = (forall t, dEdt t = energyDissipationRate P v t)
theorem underdampedClosedForm_eq (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : IsUnderdampedClosedForm P x v a = (IsUnderdamped P ∧ EquationOfMotion P x v a)
theorem criticalClosedForm_eq (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : IsCriticalClosedForm P x v a = (IsCriticallyDamped P ∧ EquationOfMotion P x v a)
theorem overdampedClosedForm_eq (P : Params) (x : Time -> Length) (v : Time -> Speed) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : IsOverdampedClosedForm P x v a = (IsOverdamped P ∧ EquationOfMotion P x v a)
def secondLaw (m : Mass) (a : Acceleration) : Force
abbrev F_of (m : Mass) (a : Acceleration) : Force
def momentum (m : Mass) (v : Speed) : Momentum
def secondLawVec {n : Nat} (m : Mass) (a : VecAcceleration n) : VecForce n
theorem momentum_change_const_mass (m : Mass) (v₂ v₁ : Speed) : momentum m v₂ - momentum m v₁ = m * (v₂ - v₁)
theorem force_from_velocity_rate_const_mass (m : Mass) (dvdt : Acceleration) : secondLaw m dvdt = m * dvdt
abbrev ScalarTrajectory
abbrev ScalarVelocityField
abbrev ScalarAccelerationField
abbrev VecTrajectory (n : Nat)
abbrev VecVelocityField (n : Nat)
abbrev VecAccelerationField (n : Nat)
def HasVelocity (x : ScalarTrajectory) (v : ScalarVelocityField) : Prop
def HasAcceleration (v : ScalarVelocityField) (a : ScalarAccelerationField) : Prop
def HasVecVelocity {n : Nat} (x : VecTrajectory n) (v : VecVelocityField n) : Prop
def HasVecAcceleration {n : Nat} (v : VecVelocityField n) (a : VecAccelerationField n) : Prop
def displacement (x2 x1 : Length) : Length
def averageVelocity (dx : Length) (dt : Time) : Speed
def velocityConstAccel (v0 : Speed) (a : Acceleration) (t : Time) : Speed
def positionConstAccel (x0 : Length) (v0 : Speed) (a : Acceleration) (t : Time) : Length
def displacementConstAccelForm2 (v0 v : Speed) (t : Time) : Length
def relativeTrajectory (xB xA : ScalarTrajectory) : ScalarTrajectory
def relativeVelocity (vB vA : ScalarVelocityField) : ScalarVelocityField
def relativeAcceleration (aB aA : ScalarAccelerationField) : ScalarAccelerationField
def vecRelativeTrajectory {n : Nat} (xB xA : VecTrajectory n) : VecTrajectory n
def vecRelativeVelocity {n : Nat} (vB vA : VecVelocityField n) : VecVelocityField n
def vecRelativeAcceleration {n : Nat} (aB aA : VecAccelerationField n) : VecAccelerationField n
theorem displacement_eq_sub (x2 x1 : Length) : displacement x2 x1 = x2 - x1
theorem position_from_displacement (x2 x1 dx : Length) (h : dx = displacement x2 x1) : x2 = x1 + dx
proof_style_example: have hval : dx.val = x2.val - x1.val := by ; simpa [displacement] using congrArg Quantity.val h ; simp [hval]

declaration_signature: theorem constant_speed_relation (x2 x1 : Length) (v : Speed) (t : Time) (h : displacement x2 x1 = Quantity.cast (v * t) SI.speed_time_eq_length) : x2 = x1 + Quantity.cast (v * t) SI.speed_time_eq_length
proof_style_example: have hval : x2.val - x1.val = (v * t).val := by ; simpa [displacement, Quantity.cast_val] using congrArg Quantity.val h ; have hsum : x2.val = x1.val + (v * t).val := by

declaration_signature: theorem velocity_increment (v v0 : Speed) (a : Acceleration) (t : Time) (h : v = velocityConstAccel v0 a t) : v - v0 = Quantity.cast (a * t) SI.acceleration_time_eq_speed
proof_style_example: have hval : v.val = v0.val + (a * t).val := by ; simpa [velocityConstAccel, Quantity.cast_val] using congrArg Quantity.val h ; have hdiff : v.val - v0.val = (a * t).val := by

declaration_signature: theorem displacement_forms_equiv (v v0 : Speed) (a : Acceleration) (t : Time) (hv : v = velocityConstAccel v0 a t) : Quantity.cast (v0 * t) SI.speed_time_eq_length + (1 / 2 : Real) • Quantity.cast (a * (t ** 2)) SI.acceleration_two_time_eq_length = displacementConstAccelForm2 v0 v t
proof_style_example: have hv' : v.val = v0.val + (a * t).val := by ; simpa [velocityConstAccel, Quantity.cast_val] using congrArg Quantity.val hv ; simp [displacementConstAccelForm2, Quantity.cast_val, hv']

declaration_signature: theorem trajectory_reconstruction (xB xA : ScalarTrajectory) : xB = fun t => xA t + relativeTrajectory xB xA t
theorem relative_trajectory_trans (xA xB xC : ScalarTrajectory) : relativeTrajectory xC xA = fun t => relativeTrajectory xC xB t + relativeTrajectory xB xA t
theorem relative_velocity_trans (vA vB vC : ScalarVelocityField) : relativeVelocity vC vA = fun t => relativeVelocity vC vB t + relativeVelocity vB vA t
theorem relative_acceleration_trans (aA aB aC : ScalarAccelerationField) : relativeAcceleration aC aA = fun t => relativeAcceleration aC aB t + relativeAcceleration aB aA t

theorem hasVelocity_relative (xA xB : ScalarTrajectory) (vA vB : ScalarVelocityField) (hA : HasVelocity xA vA) (hB : HasVelocity xB vB) : HasVelocity (relativeTrajectory xB xA) (relativeVelocity vB vA)
proof_style_example: intro t ; simpa [relativeTrajectory, relativeVelocity] using (hB t).sub (hA t)

declaration_signature: theorem hasAcceleration_relative (vA vB : ScalarVelocityField) (aA aB : ScalarAccelerationField) (hA : HasAcceleration vA aA) (hB : HasAcceleration vB aB) : HasAcceleration (relativeVelocity vB vA) (relativeAcceleration aB aA)
proof_style_example: intro t ; simpa [relativeVelocity, relativeAcceleration] using (hB t).sub (hA t)

declaration_signature: theorem hasVelocity_linear_combination (x1 x2 : ScalarTrajectory) (v1 v2 : ScalarVelocityField) (c1 c2 : Real) (h1 : HasVelocity x1 v1) (h2 : HasVelocity x2 v2) : HasVelocity (fun t => c1 • x1 t + c2 • x2 t) (fun t => c1 • v1 t + c2 • v2 t)
proof_style_example: intro t ; have h1' : HasDerivAt (fun τ => c1 * (x1 τ).val) (c1 * (v1 t).val) t := by ; simpa using (h1 t).const_mul c1

declaration_signature: theorem hasAcceleration_linear_combination (v1 v2 : ScalarVelocityField) (a1 a2 : ScalarAccelerationField) (c1 c2 : Real) (h1 : HasAcceleration v1 a1) (h2 : HasAcceleration v2 a2) : HasAcceleration (fun t => c1 • v1 t + c2 • v2 t) (fun t => c1 • a1 t + c2 • a2 t)
proof_style_example: intro t ; have h1' : HasDerivAt (fun τ => c1 * (v1 τ).val) (c1 * (a1 t).val) t := by ; simpa using (h1 t).const_mul c1

declaration_signature: theorem linear_constraint_velocity (x1 x2 : ScalarTrajectory) (v1 v2 : ScalarVelocityField) (c1 c2 : Real) (L : Length) (hConstraint : forall t, c1 • x1 t + c2 • x2 t = L) (h1 : HasVelocity x1 v1) (h2 : HasVelocity x2 v2) : forall t, c1 • v1 t + c2 • v2 t = 0
proof_style_example: intro t ; have hDeriv : HasDerivAt ; simpa using (hasVelocity_linear_combination x1 x2 v1 v2 c1 c2 h1 h2 t)

declaration_signature: theorem linear_constraint_acceleration (v1 v2 : ScalarVelocityField) (a1 a2 : ScalarAccelerationField) (c1 c2 : Real) (V : Speed) (hConstraint : forall t, c1 • v1 t + c2 • v2 t = V) (h1 : HasAcceleration v1 a1) (h2 : HasAcceleration v2 a2) : forall t, c1 • a1 t + c2 • a2 t = 0
proof_style_example: intro t ; have hDeriv : HasDerivAt ; simpa using (hasAcceleration_linear_combination v1 v2 a1 a2 c1 c2 h1 h2 t)

declaration_signature: theorem rope_constraint_velocity (x1 x2 : ScalarTrajectory) (v1 v2 : ScalarVelocityField) (L : Length) (hConstraint : forall t, x1 t + x2 t = L) (h1 : HasVelocity x1 v1) (h2 : HasVelocity x2 v2) : forall t, v1 t + v2 t = 0
proof_style_example: have hConstraint' : forall t, (1 : Real) • x1 t + (1 : Real) • x2 t = L := by ; intro t ; have hVal : (x1 t + x2 t).val = L.val := congrArg Quantity.val (hConstraint t)

declaration_signature: theorem rigid_pair_velocity_equal (xA xB : ScalarTrajectory) (vA vB : ScalarVelocityField) (Δ : Length) (hConstraint : forall t, relativeTrajectory xB xA t = Δ) (hA : HasVelocity xA vA) (hB : HasVelocity xB vB) : forall t, vB t = vA t
proof_style_example: have hlin : forall t, (1 : Real) • xB t + (-1 : Real) • xA t = Δ := by ; intro t ; have hVal : (xB t).val - (xA t).val = Δ.val := by

declaration_signature: def vecDisplacement {n : Nat} (x2 x1 : VecLength n) : VecLength n
def vecVelocityConstAccel {n : Nat} (v0 : VecSpeed n) (a : VecAcceleration n) (t : Time) : VecSpeed n
theorem vec_velocity_const_accel_eq {n : Nat} (v0 : VecSpeed n) (a : VecAcceleration n) (t : Time) : vecVelocityConstAccel v0 a t = v0 + VecQuantity.cast (a * t) SI.acceleration_time_eq_speed
theorem vec_relative_trajectory_trans {n : Nat} (xA xB xC : VecTrajectory n) : vecRelativeTrajectory xC xA = fun t => vecRelativeTrajectory xC xB t + vecRelativeTrajectory xB xA t
theorem vec_relative_velocity_trans {n : Nat} (vA vB vC : VecVelocityField n) : vecRelativeVelocity vC vA = fun t => vecRelativeVelocity vC vB t + vecRelativeVelocity vB vA t

theorem hasVecVelocity_relative {n : Nat} (xA xB : VecTrajectory n) (vA vB : VecVelocityField n) (hA : HasVecVelocity xA vA) (hB : HasVecVelocity xB vB) : HasVecVelocity (vecRelativeTrajectory xB xA) (vecRelativeVelocity vB vA)
proof_style_example: intro t i ; simpa [vecRelativeTrajectory, vecRelativeVelocity] using (hB t i).sub (hA t i)

declaration_signature: theorem hasVecAcceleration_relative {n : Nat} (vA vB : VecVelocityField n) (aA aB : VecAccelerationField n) (hA : HasVecAcceleration vA aA) (hB : HasVecAcceleration vB aB) : HasVecAcceleration (vecRelativeVelocity vB vA) (vecRelativeAcceleration aB aA)
proof_style_example: intro t i ; simpa [vecRelativeVelocity, vecRelativeAcceleration] using (hB t i).sub (hA t i)

declaration_signature: theorem rigid_pair_vec_velocity_equal {n : Nat} (xA xB : VecTrajectory n) (vA vB : VecVelocityField n) (r : VecLength n) (hConstraint : forall t, vecRelativeTrajectory xB xA t = r) (hA : HasVecVelocity xA vA) (hB : HasVecVelocity xB vB) : forall t, vB t = vA t
proof_style_example: intro t ; have hRel : HasDerivAt ; simpa [vecRelativeTrajectory, vecRelativeVelocity] using (hB t i).sub (hA t i)

declaration_signature: def TransportTheoremRelation {d : Dim} (dInertial dRelative : Real -> VecQuantity (SI.angularVelocityDim + d) 3) (omega : Real -> VecQuantity SI.angularVelocityDim 3) (A : Real -> VecQuantity d 3) : Prop
def PfaffConstraint1D (a b : Real -> Real) (v : ScalarVelocityField) : Prop

theorem pfaffConstraint1D_linear_combination (a1 b1 a2 b2 : Real -> Real) (v : ScalarVelocityField) (h1 : PfaffConstraint1D a1 b1 v) (h2 : PfaffConstraint1D a2 b2 v) (c1 c2 : Real) : PfaffConstraint1D (fun t => c1 * a1 t + c2 * a2 t) (fun t => c1 * b1 t + c2 * b2 t) v
proof_style_example: intro t ; have h1' : a1 t * (v t).val + b1 t = 0 := h1 t ; have h2' : a2 t * (v t).val + b2 t = 0 := h2 t

declaration_signature: def impulse (F : Force) (dt : Time) : Momentum
def postCollisionSpeedInelastic (m1 m2 : Mass) (v1 v2 : Speed) : Speed
theorem impulse_momentum_theorem (p2 p1 : Momentum) (F : Force) (dt : Time) (h : p2 - p1 = impulse F dt) : p2 = p1 + impulse F dt
proof_style_example: have hval : p2.val - p1.val = (impulse F dt).val := by ; simpa using congrArg Quantity.val h ; have hsum : p2.val = p1.val + (impulse F dt).val := by

declaration_signature: theorem momentum_conservation_inelastic (m1 m2 : Mass) (v1 v2 : Speed) (h : (m1 + m2).val ≠ 0) : (m1 + m2) * postCollisionSpeedInelastic m1 m2 v1 v2 = m1 * v1 + m2 * v2
proof_style_example: have h0 : m1.val + m2.val ≠ 0 := by ; simpa using h ; calc

declaration_signature: theorem impulse_def (F : Force) (dt : Time) : impulse F dt = Quantity.cast (F * dt) SI.force_time_eq_momentum
def torque (r : VecLength 3) (F : VecForce 3) : VecTorque 3
def angularMomentum (r : VecLength 3) (p : VecMomentum 3) : VecAngularMomentum 3
def rotationalKineticEnergy (I : MomentOfInertia) (omega : AngularVelocity) : Energy
def parallelAxis (Icm : MomentOfInertia) (m : Mass) (d : Length) : MomentOfInertia
theorem rotationalKineticEnergy_eq (I : MomentOfInertia) (omega : AngularVelocity) : rotationalKineticEnergy I omega = (1 / 2 : Real) • Quantity.cast (I * (omega ** 2)) SI.moi_plus_omega_sq_eq_energy
theorem parallel_axis_theorem (Icm : MomentOfInertia) (m : Mass) (d : Length) : parallelAxis Icm m d = Icm + m * (d ** 2)
theorem torque_def (r : VecLength 3) (F : VecForce 3) : torque r F = VecQuantity.cast (r ×ᵥ F) SI.length_plus_force_eq_torque
abbrev InertiaTensor
theorem zero_add_zero_dim_eq_zero : ((0 : Dim) + (0 : Dim)) = (0 : Dim)
def EulerEquationsPrincipal (I1 I2 I3 : Real) (ω1 ω2 ω3 τ1 τ2 τ3 : Real -> Real) : Prop
def RigidBodyKineticDecomposition (T Ttrans Trot : Energy) : Prop
def AngularMomentumTransport (dLInertial dLRelative : Real -> VecQuantity (0 : Dim) 3) (omega : Real -> VecQuantity (0 : Dim) 3) (L : Real -> VecQuantity (0 : Dim) 3) : Prop
def AngularMomentumTheoremParticle (Ldot : Real -> VecTorque 3) (τ : Real -> VecTorque 3) : Prop
def MomentOfMomentumTheoremSystem (LdotO MextO : Real -> VecTorque 3) : Prop
theorem rigidBodyKineticDecomposition_eq (T Ttrans Trot : Energy) : RigidBodyKineticDecomposition T Ttrans Trot = (T = Ttrans + Trot)
theorem angularMomentumTheoremParticle_eq (Ldot τ : Real -> VecTorque 3) : AngularMomentumTheoremParticle Ldot τ = (forall t, Ldot t = τ t)
theorem momentOfMomentumTheoremSystem_eq (LdotO MextO : Real -> VecTorque 3) : MomentOfMomentumTheoremSystem LdotO MextO = (forall t, LdotO t = MextO t)
def phase (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (t : Time) : Dimensionless
def position (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (t : Time) : Length
def velocity (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (t : Time) : Speed
def acceleration (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (t : Time) : Acceleration
def period (omega : AngularVelocity) : Time
def totalEnergy (m : Mass) (k : SpringConstant) (x : Length) (v : Speed) : Energy
def initialPosition (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) : Length
def initialVelocity (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) : Speed
def amplitudeFromInitial (omega : AngularVelocity) (x0 : Length) (v0 : Speed) : Length

theorem acceleration_eq_neg_omega_sq_mul_pos (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (t : Time) : acceleration A omega phi t = (-1 : Real) • Quantity.cast ((omega ** 2) * position A omega phi t) SI.omega_sq_plus_length_eq_acceleration

theorem period_frequency_relation (omega : AngularVelocity) (h : omega.val ≠ 0) : Quantity.cast (period omega * omega) SI.time_plus_angular_velocity_eq_dimensionless = (((2 : Real) * Real.pi : Real) : Dimensionless)
theorem totalEnergy_eq (m : Mass) (k : SpringConstant) (x : Length) (v : Speed) : totalEnergy m k x v = WorkEnergy.kineticEnergy1D m v + WorkEnergy.springPotential k x
theorem initialPosition_eq (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) : initialPosition A omega phi = (Real.cos phi.val) • A

theorem initialVelocity_eq (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) : initialVelocity A omega phi = (-Real.sin phi.val) • Quantity.cast (A * omega) SI.length_plus_angular_velocity_eq_speed
theorem amplitudeFromInitial_nonneg (omega : AngularVelocity) (x0 : Length) (v0 : Speed) : 0 <= (amplitudeFromInitial omega x0 v0).val
def SHMEquation (omega : AngularVelocity) (x : Time -> Length) (a : Time -> Acceleration) : Prop
def SameInitialState (x1 x2 : Time -> Length) (v1 v2 : Time -> Speed) : Prop
def UniqueByInitialState (omega : AngularVelocity) : Prop
def TurningPoint (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (t : Time) : Prop
def turningTimeCandidate (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (n : Int) : Time
theorem turningPoint_def (A : Length) (omega : AngularVelocity) (phi : PhysAngle) (t : Time) : TurningPoint A omega phi t = (velocity A omega phi t = 0)
abbrev MassLength
def massWeightedPosition (p : Particle1D) : MassLength
def totalMass : List Particle1D -> Mass | [] => 0 | p :: ps => p.m + totalMass ps
def totalMomentum : List Particle1D -> Momentum | [] => 0 | p :: ps => p.m * p.v + totalMomentum ps
def totalMassWeightedPosition : List Particle1D -> MassLength | [] => 0 | p :: ps => massWeightedPosition p + totalMassWeightedPosition ps
theorem mass_length_sub_mass_eq_length : (SI.massDim + SI.lengthDim) - SI.massDim = SI.lengthDim
theorem mass_two_sub_mass_eq_mass : (SI.massDim + SI.massDim) - SI.massDim = SI.massDim
def centerOfMassPosition (ps : List Particle1D) : Length
def centerOfMassVelocity (ps : List Particle1D) : Speed
def reducedMass (m1 m2 : Mass) : Mass
def centerVelocity2 (m1 m2 : Mass) (v1 v2 : Speed) : Speed
def relativeVelocity2 (v1 v2 : Speed) : Speed
def totalKineticEnergy2 (m1 m2 : Mass) (v1 v2 : Speed) : Energy
def decomposedKineticEnergy2 (m1 m2 : Mass) (v1 v2 : Speed) : Energy
theorem totalMass_nil : totalMass [] = 0
theorem totalMomentum_nil : totalMomentum [] = 0
theorem totalMass_cons (p : Particle1D) (ps : List Particle1D) : totalMass (p :: ps) = p.m + totalMass ps
theorem totalMomentum_cons (p : Particle1D) (ps : List Particle1D) : totalMomentum (p :: ps) = p.m * p.v + totalMomentum ps
theorem centerOfMassPosition_singleton (p : Particle1D) (h : p.m.val ≠ 0) : centerOfMassPosition [p] = p.x
theorem centerOfMassVelocity_singleton (p : Particle1D) (h : p.m.val ≠ 0) : centerOfMassVelocity [p] = p.v
theorem totalMomentum_two_eq_totalMass_mul_centerVelocity (m1 m2 : Mass) (v1 v2 : Speed) (h : (m1 + m2).val ≠ 0) : m1 * v1 + m2 * v2 = (m1 + m2) * centerVelocity2 m1 m2 v1 v2
proof_style_example: have hM : m1.val + m2.val ≠ 0 := by simpa using h ; calc ; = m1.val * v1.val + m2.val * v2.val := by simp

declaration_signature: theorem reducedMass_symm (m1 m2 : Mass) : reducedMass m1 m2 = reducedMass m2 m1
theorem twoBody_kineticEnergy_decomposition (m1 m2 : Mass) (v1 v2 : Speed) (h : (m1 + m2).val ≠ 0) : totalKineticEnergy2 m1 m2 v1 v2 = decomposedKineticEnergy2 m1 m2 v1 v2
proof_style_example: have hM : m1.val + m2.val ≠ 0 := by simpa using h ; simp [totalKineticEnergy2, decomposedKineticEnergy2, WorkEnergy.kineticEnergy1D, ; field_simp [hM]

declaration_signature: def CenterOfMassTheorem (M : Mass) (Rddot : Real -> Acceleration) (Fext : Real -> Force) : Prop
def VariableMassMomentumBalance (pDot : Real -> Force) (Fext : Real -> Force) (Fflux : Real -> Force) : Prop
def SystemMomentBalanceAboutOrigin (LdotO : Real -> VecTorque 3) (MextO : Real -> VecTorque 3) : Prop
theorem centerOfMassTheorem_eq (M : Mass) (Rddot : Real -> Acceleration) (Fext : Real -> Force) : CenterOfMassTheorem M Rddot Fext = (forall t, M * Rddot t = Fext t)
theorem variableMassMomentumBalance_eq (pDot : Real -> Force) (Fext Fflux : Real -> Force) : VariableMassMomentumBalance pDot Fext Fflux = (forall t, pDot t = Fext t + Fflux t)
theorem systemMomentBalanceAboutOrigin_eq (LdotO MextO : Real -> VecTorque 3) : SystemMomentBalanceAboutOrigin LdotO MextO = (forall t, LdotO t = MextO t)
def work {n : Nat} (F : VecForce n) (s : VecLength n) : Energy
def kineticEnergy {n : Nat} (m : Mass) (v : VecSpeed n) : Energy
def kineticEnergy1D (m : Mass) (v : Speed) : Energy
def springPotential (k : SpringConstant) (x : Length) : Energy
def hookeForce (k : SpringConstant) (x : Length) : Force
theorem hooke_force_eq (k : SpringConstant) (x : Length) : hookeForce k x = Quantity.cast (-(k * x)) SI.spring_plus_length_eq_force

theorem kineticEnergy_change_formula (m : Mass) (v2 v1 : Speed) : kineticEnergy1D m v2 - kineticEnergy1D m v1 = (1 / 2 : Real) • Quantity.cast (m * ((v2 ** 2) - (v1 ** 2))) SI.mass_two_speed_eq_energy
theorem work_def {n : Nat} (F : VecForce n) (s : VecLength n) : work F s = F ⬝ᵥ s
theorem force_length_eq_energy : SI.forceDim + SI.lengthDim = SI.energyDim
def work1D (F : Force) (dx : Length) : Energy
theorem work1D_def (F : Force) (dx : Length) : work1D F dx = Quantity.cast (F * dx) force_length_eq_energy
theorem work_energy_theorem_core (Wnet K2 K1 : Energy) (h : Wnet = K2 - K1) : K2 = K1 + Wnet
proof_style_example: have hval : Wnet.val = K2.val - K1.val := by ; simpa using congrArg Quantity.val h ; have hsum : K2.val = K1.val + Wnet.val := by

declaration_signature: theorem conservative_nonconservative_split (K2 K1 U2 U1 Wnet Wcons Wnoncons : Energy) (hNet : Wnet = K2 - K1) (hCons : Wcons = -(U2 - U1)) (hDecomp : Wnet = Wcons + Wnoncons) : (K2 + U2) - (K1 + U1) = Wnoncons
proof_style_example: have hNetVal : Wnet.val = K2.val - K1.val := by ; simpa using congrArg Quantity.val hNet ; have hConsVal : Wcons.val = -(U2.val - U1.val) := by

theorem speed_time_eq_length : speedDim + timeDim = lengthDim
theorem acceleration_time_eq_speed : accelerationDim + timeDim = speedDim
theorem damping_speed_eq_force : dampingDim + speedDim = forceDim
theorem damping_two_speed_eq_power : dampingDim + (2 : Nat) • speedDim = powerDim
theorem length_plus_angular_velocity_eq_speed : lengthDim + angularVelocityDim = speedDim
theorem acceleration_two_time_eq_length : accelerationDim + (2 : Nat) • timeDim = lengthDim
theorem angular_velocity_time_eq_dimensionless : angularVelocityDim + timeDim = (0 : Dim)
theorem time_plus_angular_velocity_eq_dimensionless : timeDim + angularVelocityDim = (0 : Dim)
theorem omega_sq_plus_length_eq_acceleration : (2 : Nat) • angularVelocityDim + lengthDim = accelerationDim
theorem momentum_sub_mass_eq_speed : momentumDim - massDim = speedDim
theorem force_time_eq_momentum : forceDim + timeDim = momentumDim
theorem length_plus_force_eq_torque : lengthDim + forceDim = torqueDim
theorem length_plus_momentum_eq_angularMomentum : lengthDim + momentumDim = angularMomentumDim
theorem spring_plus_length_eq_force : springConstantDim + lengthDim = forceDim
theorem spring_plus_two_length_eq_energy : springConstantDim + (2 : Nat) • lengthDim = energyDim
theorem mass_plus_two_omega_eq_spring : massDim + (2 : Nat) • angularVelocityDim = springConstantDim
theorem mass_plus_spring_eq_damping_discriminant : massDim + springConstantDim = dampingDiscriminantDim
theorem mass_speed_sq_eq_energy : massDim + (speedDim + speedDim) = energyDim
theorem mass_two_speed_eq_energy : massDim + (2 : Nat) • speedDim = energyDim
theorem moi_plus_omega_sq_eq_energy : momentOfInertiaDim + (2 : Nat) • angularVelocityDim = energyDim
def unit (U : UnitChoices) (d : Dim) : Quantity d
theorem unit_ne_zero (U : UnitChoices) (d : Dim) : (U.unit d).val ≠ 0
def inChoice (U : UnitChoices) {d : Dim} (q : Quantity d) : Real
theorem inChoice_eq_val_div_scale (U : UnitChoices) {d : Dim} (q : Quantity d) : inChoice U q = q.val / U.dimScale d
theorem inChoice_self (U : UnitChoices) (d : Dim) : inChoice U (U.unit d) = 1
def conversionFactor {d : Dim} (uFrom uTo : Quantity d) : Real
theorem conversionFactor_comp {d : Dim} (u1 u2 u3 : Quantity d) (h2 : u2.val ≠ 0) : conversionFactor u1 u3 = conversionFactor u1 u2 * conversionFactor u2 u3
theorem conversionFactor_mul_swap {d : Dim} (u1 u2 : Quantity d) (h1 : u1.val ≠ 0) (h2 : u2.val ≠ 0) : conversionFactor u1 u2 * conversionFactor u2 u1 = 1
proof_style_example: simpa [conversionFactor] using Quantity.inUnits_mul_symm (u1 := u2) (u2 := u1) h2 h1
